description: The Mindmap module: nodes, edges, canvas, layouts, minimap, export—not general app settings unless clearly Mindmap-specific.
detection_hint: mindmap, mind map, node, edge, canvas, hierarchy, minimap, zoom, layout tree, radial, export png, mindmap module

injection.system_prompt_fragment: Mindmaps: nodes, edges, styles, autolayout. Tools: list_mindmaps, read_mindmap (layout_algorithm, node style, edge type), create_mindmap, add_node (parent must exist if set), connect_nodes, style_mindmap_node, style_mindmap_subtree (style all hierarchy descendants of anchor_node_id; optional include_anchor), style_mindmap_edge, apply_mindmap_layout, open_mindmap. Prefer tools over prose when mutating diagrams.
